questions.question: Some common pipe fittings in hydronic systems include ___________.
Fittings for copper tubing are available in either wrought copper or ____.
A feed water valve is used to increase the pressure of water from a domestic water distribution pipe before it enters a hydronic system.
A(n) _____ is commonly used to mount an air vent at high points in piping circuits.
Hydronic heating systems should never use a combination of flexible and rigid piping materials.
Some press fittings used in residential and light commercial buildings are rated to operate at pressures up to 200 psi and temperatures ranging from 0 to 250ºF.
When soldering copper tubing be sure the tube cut is square. Use a(n) _______ with a blade suitable for the copper tubing.
A well-planned piping assembly will use the largest number of fittings possible.
The driving force of ________ is a lower concentration of dissolved oxygen molecules within the water inside the tube, compared to the concentration outside the tube.
If the inlet pressure on the backflow preventer drops below the pressure in the hydronic system, springs return both check valves and the movable cartridge to their ____ positions.
A device used to allow or prevent flow through a zone circuit is called a(n) _____.
Feed water valves operate by balancing the force generated by water pressure against an internal flexible ____, with the counterforce generated by a partially compressed spring.
The smaller the coefficient of linear expansion, the _____ tubing expands for a given change in temperature.
In situations where both piping and electrical wiring are in close proximity, try to keep the piping above the electrical wiring.
Copper tubing must be properly supported to prevent sagging or buckling. On horizontal runs of hard temper tubing, the maximum support spacing for 1/2- and 3/4-inch tube is ____ feet.
________ are used to secure piping to either walls or ceilings.
Hydronic heating systems, once assembled, must be purged of air and filled with fluid. A(n) ____ is specifically designed for this purpose.

When long straight runs of rigid tubing are required, it may be necessary to install an expansion loop or an expansion offset to absorb the movement. Another alternative is to install an expansion ____ capable of absorbing the movement.
ASTM F876 standard for PEX tubing establishes three simultaneous temperature/pressure ratings based on operation with water.

____ tubing consists of high-density polyethylene that has undergone molecule modification that creates sufficient tie chains between the polyethylene molecules to allow it to operate at higher temperatures.
Another specialty valve widely used in hydronic systems provides the ability to isolate, flow balance, and even drain individual heat emitters. It is called a ____.
______ are designed specifically for component isolation.
In situations where good heat transfer through the walls of the pipe is desirable, ____ is unsurpassed.
Piping schematics are the road maps of hydronic system design. Unfortunately, there is no universal standard for piping symbols to which all those in the hydronics industry subscribe.
There is ___ universal standard for piping symbols to which all those in the industry subscribe.
